message:
feat(overlays): add overlay chrome primitives (s4qx.3.3)

Add composable primitives for consistent overlay content structure:
- OverlayStack: vertical stack with consistent spacing
- OverlaySection: bordered content section with optional header
- OverlaySectionHeader: standard header with badge, title, description
- OverlayToolbar: top toolbar for filters and toggles
- OverlayGrid: responsive grid for content items
- OverlayRow: single row with hover/selection styling
- OverlayKeyValue: key-value display for data rows
- OverlayBadge: small contextual badge/tag

Migrate HelpOverlay and AAKeyOverlay to use new primitives,
demonstrating the pattern for other overlays.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
